name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The situation at America’s border
body:
At 7:50 p.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump will join a roundtable in Mississippi on the historic, bipartisan criminal justice reform bill...

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73bfc192ec&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • November 26, 2018

** Watch live tonight
------------------------------------------------------------
At 7:50 p.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump will join a roundtable in Mississippi on the historic, bipartisan criminal justice reform bill he backed on November 14.

The FIRST STEP Act will reform America’s prisons to make our communities safer and our justice system fairer. Nearly all incarcerated Americans will one day leave prison. The goal of this legislation is simple: to make sure they don’t return.

Watch President Trump’s roundtable live at 7:50 p.m. ET. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f27985abf8&e=3ee4985eea)

Need to know: Why President Trump supports criminal justice reform (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4639171c17&e=3ee4985eea)

** The situation at America’s border
------------------------------------------------------------
Yesterday, U.S. Customs and Border Protection agents and officers effectively and professionally managed an extremely dangerous situation involving more than 1,000 individuals who sought to enter the United States illegally.

CBP was forced to close the San Ysidro Port of Entry (POE) near San Diego, California, to ensure public safety and security. The POE remained closed for about 5 hours. After attempting and being prevented from entering, a group of migrants tried to breach legacy border fence infrastructure and sought to harm CBP personnel by throwing projectiles.

Four agents were struck by projectiles—most likely rocks—but were wearing protective gear and did not suffer serious injuries.

As they dispersed a violent crowd, CBP made more than 60 arrests. Of the thousand or so protestors involved, only a handful of minors were present. The vast majority of participants were single male adults.

Both American and Mexican officials say these actions are not consistent with peaceful asylum seekers. On Friday, Tijuana Mayor Juan Manuel Gastelum declared a humanitarian crisis in his city, which he said was struggling to accommodate the influx. “No city in the world is prepared to receive this,” he said.

U.S. Border Patrol leaders have made clear that a wall is needed to preserve law and order. “One thing we saw that we could absolutely use yesterday was infrastructure,” Border Patrol Chief of Law Enforcement Operations Brian Hastings said. “That infrastructure was breached yesterday. We are repairing it now, but without a doubt, we could use a wall in an area like that.”

President Trump: No one gets a free pass to enter America illegally. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb8c417994&e=3ee4985eea)

Big picture: How our weak asylum laws make everyone worse off (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7b254f26a&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
First Lady Melania Trump reviews Christmas decorations in the Cross Hall of the White House | November 25, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f42700ece8&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a2ea79618&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0cc77e7ab3)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Happy #GivingTuesday!
body:
| | Make an investment in the future of our nation
---
[ ](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181127apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127apl01ndam&n=1)
| Peter, Happy #GivingTuesday! I’m excited to share with you that we have some big plans underway for 2019! We are focusing on three key areas that have the power to protect families, restore communities, and advance America’s biblical rooted ideals for generations to come.
* Mobilize Christians to pray to defend biblical principles being attacked in our culture
* Equip Christians with a biblical worldview through some incredible new resources we are building
* Activate millions to not only vote in the local and state elections taking place in 2019, but also to take specific unified action in our communities for biblical values

**[Please donate now towards our one-day #GivingTuesday $20,000 goal towards helping make these plans possible](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181127apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127apl01ndam&n=2)!** **[And when you make a donation today your gift will be doubled dollar for dollar by a generous matching grant](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181127apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127apl01ndam&n=3)!** This is an investment in the future of our nation for the sake of our nation, our communities, and most importantly our families. Please make your best donation today and help us reach our goal! [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181127apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127apl01ndam&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181127apl01ndam&n=5)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Camp Fire Relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QVaPWk_uq6BCTTpbUtALrjhIxkC7q0mQ1EOE_ZoB6xs=/fHqNWkoanbbWdAnzZSTwGR7-WfWM_lFp33siMrr8Tus=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181105_JM_20181105-jmfinal_all_logo)
Peter,
I'm writing to you this morning from Chico, CA, where I've spent the last two weeks getting families into safe shelter and helping coordinate and streamline relief efforts.
I know so many of you have already generously donated, opened your hearts, your homes, your time and energy to support our neighbors in need. Please consider giving more.
**[Donate to the North Valley Community Foundation today](https://act.myngp.com/el/QVaPWk_uq6BCTTpbUtALrjhIxkC7q0mQ1EOE_ZoB6xs=/XpYmQ26PUTjK5m-xYemBOBcpaM5eofu2_uJaUfqVjVg=?funit_id=2012)**
Having been on the ground here for over two weeks, I can attest that the North Valley Community Foundation has been nimble, responsive, and will be central to the rebuilding and recovery efforts.
Over the last two weeks, I've witnessed incredible resilience, strength, and generosity.
I met a member of the Paradise school board who, having lost her own home, went shelter-to-shelter and hotel-to-hotel to ensure that her students were safe. I held back tears as I held a 3-week old baby who was stuck in the Walmart parking lot with its family. Volunteers from my campaign generously donated their trailer to house this family.
In the coming weeks, I will highlight volunteer opportunities and give some insight from my experience on the ground. In the meantime, the biggest impact you can have today is a direct financial donation to support the incredible efforts on the ground here.
Thank you for all of your generous support during this crisis,

Jessica

P.S. My apologies to those who have not received a thank you note or a call from me yet -- that is my plan for December (and January).

** **
[Donate to Camp Fire Relief](https://act.myngp.com/el/QVaPWk_uq6BCTTpbUtALrjhIxkC7q0mQ1EOE_ZoB6xs=/XpYmQ26PUTjK5m-xYemBOBcpaM5eofu2_uJaUfqVjVg=?funit_id=2012)
---
** **
** **
** **
** **
** **
Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.
---
Jessica Morse for Congress
1079 Sunrise Ave
Ste B 275
Roseville CA 95661 United States
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/QVaPWk_uq6BCTTpbUtALrjhIxkC7q0mQ1EOE_ZoB6xs=/Az_nyrQvAZpqk0lXFePMEl5DtfJq2Med8EGm1GHvsUI=)._

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Let's talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I know you've received a lot of emails during this election -- many of them from us. But we noticed that you haven't read our emails in a while. [**I want to know: what inspired you to join Team DWS? What would you like to read in our emails?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc3/622b7b5b/1e035f7c/307b7f5a/4249666341/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181119i") | | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc3/622b7b5b/1e035f7c/307b7f5a/4249666341/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181119i")
---
The election wasn't the end of the fight -- it was only the beginning. Now we have to get to work, passing legislation to protect our values and ensuring Trump's hateful, extreme agenda doesn't come to pass.
In order to do that, we need people like you to stay engaged. [**Take our survey and share what you 'd like to see in our emails.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc3/622b7b5b/1e035f7c/307b7f5a/4249666341/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e181119i")
Let's keep fighting,
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc3/622b7b5b/1e035f7c/307b7f5d/4249666341/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: would love to see you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Despite the chilly weather, it's that time of year again -- our second annual Fall Harvest Social.
I'd love to connect about the issues important to you, and it would mean the world to me to have you there. The details and a link to RSVP are below:
**WHEN:** November 29, 2018, 6-8 PM
**WHERE:** Puritan Backroom, 245 Hooksett Road, Manchester, NH 03104
**RSVP:[https://hassan.bsd.net/Harvest-Social-2018](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc11b/2a380d31/34374877/f17438/4190457183/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/harvestsocial2?refcode=email")**
I hope to see you Thursday.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc11b/2a380d31/34374877/f17438/4190457183/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/harvestsocial2?refcode=email")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc11b/2a380d31/34374877/f17439/4190457183/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 3 Times Previous Presidents Closed the Southern Border
body:
In The Daily Signal, Fred Lucas explains the precedent behind the Trump Administration's recent efforts to protect our southern border. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76e39ccbf5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# 3 Times Previous Presidents Closed the Southern Border

In _The Daily Signal_ , Fred Lucas explains the precedent behind the Trump Administration's recent efforts to protect our southern border.

“Presidents Richard Nixon and Ronald Reagan both closed the border over drug-related issues that halted entry from Mexico into the United States,” Lucas reports. “With Nixon in 1969 and Reagan in 1985—as is the case today—the United States was trying to pressure the Mexican government’s law enforcement into stepping up its efforts.”

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95d98c5147&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is correct on nationalism,” Boris Epshteyn writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2cdefd0611&e=3ee4985eea)_. Not only has putting America first on the world stage produced real wins for the country, but “being a nationalist is to correctly believe that America is a beacon of freedom and is the greatest country in the world. These are sentiments all Americans should want to get behind.”
---
|
---
| "President Donald Trump and I both saw the devastation of the fire on our recent trips to California: piles of rubble recognizable as houses only by their chimneys and charred appliances, and vehicles melted to the pavement in pools of molten aluminum. We also saw the heroism of firefighters, first responders and volunteers working together to battle the blaze and help the community," [Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24f7591a38&e=3ee4985eea) writes.
---
|
---
| A senior official in the U.S. Border Patrol backed up President Trump’s call for a border wall following a dangerous incident near the San Ysidro Port of Entry this weekend. "Absolutely,” Brian Hastings told _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb972aa526&e=3ee4985eea)_ when asked if agents wanted a wall. “It’s important to note that we have 2,000 arrests per day besides the caravan. That's everyday business right now for us. We're very busy. This caravan just adds another component or another challenge to what we do daily.”
---
|
---
| "The new version of the First Step Act, endorsed by President Trump last week, is that rarest of Washington happenings: a compromise bill that actually raises the bar rather than settling for the lowest common denominator," workforce development expert Brent Orrell writes for the [American Enterprise Institute](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7025d23661&e=3ee4985eea). The bill will bring "reforms that serve the twin goals of justice and rehabilitation.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2f3dcdabd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a3dbcad4e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6ac04a5137)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 2,700 diapers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Did you know that in their first year of life, a baby goes through an average of 2,700 diapers? Even if you shop in bulk and find discounts, a family will spend a minimum of $550 on diapers. **Peter, one in three U.S. families cannot afford enough diapers.** This is a _basic need_ for all children. Diapers ensure babies are less susceptible to infections and illness. As a father and grandfather, I hope you will join me in supporting a great cause dedicated to keeping babies healthy. **This Giving Tuesday, I encourage you to donate to the National Diaper Bank Network.** This organization is dedicated to raising awareness about diaper need and supporting community-based diaper banks. The National Diaper Bank Network encourages donations of dollars or diapers. Peter, I'm asking you for dollars. [**In the spirit of Giving Tuesday, make a donation to the National Diaper Bank Network.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd8d/4462dc26/8ab011e9/201f0c84/3118785487/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sb-diaperbank") | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd8d/4462dc26/8ab011e9/201f0c84/3118785487/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sb-diaperbank")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd8d/4462dc26/8ab011e9/201f0d7b/3118785487/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---

Even if you shop in bulk and find discounts, a family will spend a minimum of $550 on diapers. Peter, one in three U.S. families cannot afford enough diapers. This is a basic need for all children. Diapers ensure babies are less susceptible to infections and illness. As a father and grandfather, I hope you will join me in supporting a great cause dedicated to keeping babies healthy. This Giving Tuesday, I encourage you to donate to the National Diaper Bank Network. This organization is dedicated to raising awareness about diaper need and supporting community-based diaper banks. The National Diaper Bank Network encourages donations of dollars or diapers. Peter, I'm asking you for dollars. "" | | | "" With gratitude, Sherrod | "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Heather Gautney, Our Revolution
subject: This #GivingTuesday is revolutionary
body:
Support the revolution by sporting our union-made merchandise from the Our Revolution store!
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f17/1509476768/VEsH/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?source=em181127")
Friends,
This #GivingTuesday, you have the chance to support our work to revitalize American democracy, including organizing with over 600 local groups and hundreds of thousands of members nationwide. These groups helped to elect dozens of endorsed candidates at all levels of government, from county commission to Congress, and will push forward a bold, progressive agenda. Going into 2019, we have an opportunity to shape the course of history - passing Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a $15 minimum wage and more in the House. Are you with us?
**[Visit the Our Revolution online store- our union-made merchandise supports the calling, texting, and organizing campaigns that have people like you building the political revolution in your communities.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f17/1509476768/VEsE/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?source=em181127")**
Put your money toward a cause worth fighting for and check out our brand new apparel in the Our Revolution store!
**[CHECK IT OUT»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f17/1509476768/VEsF/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?source=em181127")**
In solidarity,
Heather Gautney
Executive Director
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f16/1509476768/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f11/1509476768/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f10/1509476768/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a734/bed43eb/8a5216f0/75fc5f13/1509476768/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 2020: A referendum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Every vote -- every candidate -- we have to make this happen.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d2/762428806/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/videos/359352564641170") Friend, I'm not surprised by this new climate report, and I'm just as deeply worried about our climate as ever. The report, released on Friday by the US government, proves us right -- we are facing catastrophe if we don't act. We must take action. And that is why I am calling for the 2020 election to be a referendum on climate change. Every vote we cast must be cast in the spirit of ending climate change. Every candidate we elect must believe in a 100% clean energy future. Every step we take must be toward a new, fossil-fuel-free economy. [**Do you agree? Watch my video and sign on with me to demand that 2020 be a referendum on climate change.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d2/762428806/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/videos/359352564641170") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d2/762428806/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/videos/359352564641170") No matter how much Donald Trump ignores it, climate change is here. The blunt truth is that people are dying. Fires are burning thousands of people's homes and livelihoods. Hurricanes are pummeling our communities and floods are washing away neighborhoods. Our future depends on us taking action. [**Are you with me?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d2/762428806/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/videos/359352564641170") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [WATCH & SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d2/762428806/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/videos/359352564641170")
---

_Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d1/762428806/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-11-27_climate-video&refcode=ema_2018-11-27_climate-video&utm_campaign=climate-video&utm_medium=ema")
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b20b/2f5ea88d/7b72cb89/2cbdb3d0/762428806/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). subject: ICYMI: Indiana Republicans reach their historical apex
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
In case you missed it, check out this column running now in publications statewide about Indiana's Republicans' great year!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/congratulations-senator-todd-young-467889?e=1acd9bb3d6)
ICYMI: Indiana Republicans Reach Their Historical Apex
https://www.southbendtribune.com/news/opinion/howey-indiana-republicans-reach-their-historical-apex/article_44636b9c-72a1-5ea0-b8c9-bb700c24c106.html?mc_cid=a3a341161f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
In case you missed it, check out this column running now in publications statewide about Indiana's Republicans' great year:

Indiana Republicans Reach Their Historical Apex
Brian Howey, Howey Politics Indiana

"Indiana Republicans are at their historic apex. They control 107 out of 150 General Assembly seats (and almost all of the rural seats), nine out of 11 congressional offices, and all of the Statehouse constitutional positions...."

"Gov. Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republican Chairman Kyle Hupfer preside over this cascading exhibition of absolute power.

For Hupfer, Mike Braun’s dispatching of Donnelly was the culmination of a two-year effort that reached across multiple platforms, party entities and campaigns. “Not only did we have good funding, we had early funding where we could really build up that infrastructure over the state for well over a year,” Hupfer said in a Howey Politics Indiana interview..."

-->> READ MORE -->> (https://www.southbendtribune.com/news/opinion/howey-indiana-republicans-reach-their-historical-apex/article_44636b9c-72a1-5ea0-b8c9-bb700c24c106.html?mc_cid=a3a341161f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Team Cooper
subject: Do you have Roy's back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Let's keep this momentum rolling.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203e7b/2fde7c66/483a8991/15686374/3249013667/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov_eom1?refcode=20181127_em_nov_eom1_tc")
---
Let's keep this rolling, Friend.

Breaking the supermajorities in BOTH the House and Senate was a big deal. Now we have to make sure we continue this momentum through the end of this year and into next year. Right now, legislators are in town for a special session and Roy is fighting to make sure North Carolina rebuilds stronger and smarter from Hurricane Florence. **Let's show them that we've got his back and we're not messing around. Chip in before the end-of-November fundraising deadline to keep the momentum going:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203e7b/2fde7c66/483a8991/15686377/3249013667/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov_eom1?refcode=20181127_em_nov_eom1_tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
